titleStmt.title: SII 41.102: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 102. (A.R. No. 101 of 1905.) Ambāsamudram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the south wall of the Erichcha-Udaiyar shrine in the Erichchā-Uḍaiyār temple at Ambāsamudram.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Vīra-pāṇḍya, ‘who took the head of the Chōḻa’, Year 12+1, Mithuna month, Solar eclipse = 959 June 9.

summary.p: In Vaṭṭeḻuttu charecters. Records that the king donated ten vēli of land at Vaḻudiyūr in Muḷḷi-nāḍu as kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadāna to the temple Tiruppōttuḍaiya-Bhaṭārar in the same nāḍu. The officer Chōḷāntakabrahmārāyar supervised the apportioning of the produce of the land for various services in the temple.
[Published in South Indian Inscriptions, vol. XIV, No. 95 & Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XXV, p. 35ff.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . coḻaṉṟalai koṇṭa kovirapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu Ivvāṇṭu midhuṉa ñāyiṟṟu sūrya
muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam Iḷaṅkoykkuṭi tiruppottuṭaiya bhaṭārarkku Iññāṭṭu vaḻutiūr
Āṟu pāccal nilaṉ patiṟṟuveli patiṟṟuveli2m kuṭikaḷitu kārāṇmaiyākavum tevaritum
tāṉamāka 2 10 5pu poṉmaṉṟavāri Uṭpaṭa Eṅkarumam Ārāycci meleḻuttuc ceykiṉṟa
ṟṟattu kāṭantaikuṭippāṭittamiḻaveḷāṉ Āyiṉa
nāṭum maṇalūrkkuḷakkiḻ Iraṇaciṅkamaṅkalattup
ṉa Araiyaṉ māṉāparaṇaṉ Ēvimutalākavum Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭṭu
m Ōlai Eḻuttākavum Aṇṭanāṭṭuk kuvvalayaciṅkanallūr Āyiṉa meyūr tiruppattūr
ḷā maṇikiḻavaṉ vāykeḻvi Ākavum koḻuvūrkkūṟṟattu kīḻkuṇṭāṟṟu veḷiyāṟṟūr vikkiramapāṇṭiya muventa
veḷāṉ Āyiṉa kaṭṭinakkaṉ Iraṇaṉ paṇṭārappottakamākavum Iḷaṅkoykkuṭit tiruppottuṭaiya [*pa]ramecurapaṭārar koyilil Iruntu
paṉṉiraṇṭāmāṇṭu mituṉa nāyiṟṟu sūryagrahaṇatti nāṉṟu Ivvāṇṭiṉ Etirāṇṭu mutalk kuṭiniṅkāttevatāṉam Āka kuṭuttom tāṅka
ḷum Itu kaṇṭu pāṟpaṭuttuk kuṭukka . pullaṅkoṟṟaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟa Ittirumukappaṭi koṇṭu Atikārañceykiṉṟa coḷāntaka brahma mārāyar Ippatiṟ
ṟu veliyaiy nivantam Aṭaiccapaṭi kalmel Eḻuttu veṭṭuka Eṉṟu patiṉañcām yāṇṭiṉ Etir Añcām yāṇṭu śrīkāryam peṟṟapa
māṇaṉukku Amaccu Ittiruppottuṭaiya devarkku śrīkāryam ceykiṉṟa tevaṉ kiriṇaṉ colla kalmel Eḻuttu veṭṭiṉapaṭi . tiru
ppottuṭaiya tevarkku nāṉku potukku Arici muppattirunāḻi2m Aṉṉapalikku Arici Aṟunāḻi2m kaṟiamitukku Ari
cināḻi2m tiruveṅkaṭanilaittevarkku nicati Arici nānāḻi2m tirumūlattāṉattut tevarkku nicati Arici nānā
ḻi2m kaṇavatiyāṟkku Arici Irunāḻi2m Ēṟṟi nicati Arici nāṟppattoṉpatināḻi2m Āka O
kku nelk kalaney Oṉpatiṉ kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyuri Orāṭṭaikku nel Aṟunūṟṟu Eṇpatte
yeṭṭu mākkāṇiyum Ācārcciyaṉ munnūṟṟuvaṉ centaṉukku nilaṉ Araiyum . kaṇakkapaṇṭārañ ceykiṉṟa colaiviru periyāṉukku nilaṉ Araiyu[m .*] mā
n Eṭṭiṉuku nilaṉ Oṉṟaraiyeyiraṇṭumā. Ivaṟṟuḷ munnūṟṟuvaṉ centaṉuṭaiya māṇmūṉṟum munnūṟṟuvaṉ periyāṉ māṇoṉṟum kacaṉāk
kalaṉuṭaiya māṇālum . tevar patuvāram Eḻiloṉṟu Uvaiccakaḷukkum puṭavai mutalākavum . Aṟukūṟum Eṭṭu māṇukkum puṭavai mutalākavum . Uvaicca
ṉ kaṇavatikumāraṭi mutal pattāḷukku nilamoṉṟekāl . śrīkārcciyam Ārāyvāṉukku niyatamarici nāṉāḻiyiṉāl nilam Eḻumā . kucavaṉukku ni
lamiraṇṭumā . viṟakiṭuvāṉukku nilamiraṇṭumā . tirumeḻukkuppuṟam nilamiraṇṭumā . Īraṅkollikku nilamiraṇṭumā . tiruviḻāppuṟam ni
laṉ veli . putukkuppuṟam Ittirukkaṟṟaḷi ceyta Ācāriyaṉ māṉāparaṇaṉ centaṉukku nilaṉkālumāka nilaṉ patiṟṟu ve
liyum cantirātittavalñ celvatāka vaittār coḷantakatevar . Itupaṉ māheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
